all.en: Thank you all for joining today's customer journey mapping workshop.
all.zh: 感謝各位參加今天的顧客旅程地圖工作坊。

all.en: Our goal is to map the end to end experience of our enterprise buyers.
all.zh: 我們的目標是繪製企業客戶從頭到尾的完整體驗。

all.en: We have invited participants from sales, support, product, and marketing.
all.zh: 我們邀請了業務、客服、產品與行銷部門的參與者。

all.en: Cross functional perspectives are essential for an accurate journey map.
all.zh: 跨功能觀點對於繪製精準的旅程地圖至關重要。

all.en: We will focus on a single primary persona named Operations Director Olivia.
all.zh: 我們將聚焦於一個名為營運總監 Olivia 的主要人物誌。

all.en: Olivia represents mid market manufacturers evaluating new software platforms.
all.zh: Olivia 代表評估新軟體平台的中型市場製造商。

all.en: The journey will be divided into five main stages from awareness to advocacy.
all.zh: 本旅程將分為從認知到擁護的五個主要階段。

all.en: For each stage we will capture actions, thoughts, and emotional highs and lows.
all.zh: 每個階段我們將擷取行動、想法以及情緒高峰與低谷。

all.en: We will also identify the touchpoints and channels involved at every step.
all.zh: 我們也將辨識每個步驟所涉及的接觸點與管道。

all.en: Please use the sticky notes provided to add observations to the wall map.
all.zh: 請使用提供的便利貼將觀察加入牆面地圖上。

all.en: Color coding will help us distinguish pain points from positive moments.
all.zh: 顏色分類將協助我們區分痛點與正向時刻。

all.en: Red notes indicate pain points, while green notes represent delight moments.
all.zh: 紅色便利貼代表痛點，綠色便利貼代表愉悅時刻。

all.en: Yellow notes are reserved for open questions that need further research.
all.zh: 黃色便利貼保留給需要進一步研究的待解問題。

all.en: We have ninety minutes scheduled for the active mapping portion.
all.zh: 我們為主動繪製的部分排定了九十分鐘。

all.en: Afterward we will spend thirty minutes identifying priority improvement areas.
all.zh: 之後我們將花三十分鐘辨識優先改善領域。

all.en: Each priority area will be paired with a tentative owner from this room.
all.zh: 每個優先領域將由今天在場的成員初步認領負責。

all.en: Please remember to ground every observation in real customer evidence.
all.zh: 請記得每項觀察都應立基於真實顧客證據。

all.en: Recent interview transcripts and support tickets are available on the side table.
all.zh: 近期訪談逐字稿與客服工單放置於側邊桌上可供參考。

all.en: We will document the final map digitally within three working days.
all.zh: 我們將於三個工作天內將最終地圖數位化記錄下來。

all.en: A shared online version will be distributed for ongoing comments.
all.zh: 共享的線上版本將分發出去以持續收集意見。

all.en: Action items will be tracked through our standard quarterly planning cycle.
all.zh: 行動項目將透過我們標準的季度規劃週期進行追蹤。

all.en: Please silence your devices and stay engaged with the group exercises.
all.zh: 請將裝置靜音並專注參與小組演練活動。

all.en: Light refreshments are available at the back of the room throughout the session.
all.zh: 場地後方於整場活動中均備有輕食點心。

all.en: Let us now break into our assigned groups and begin the first stage.
all.zh: 現在讓我們分成既定小組並開始第一階段。

all.en: Each group has been assigned a trained facilitator to keep discussions on track.
all.zh: 每組皆配有一位受訓帶領者以確保討論不離題。

all.en: Please appoint a scribe and a timekeeper within your group right away.
all.zh: 請即刻於組內推派一位紀錄者與一位計時員。

all.en: Share the airtime equally and invite quieter voices to contribute.
all.zh: 請平均分配發言時間並邀請較沉默的聲音貢獻意見。

all.en: When in doubt, default to the customer perspective rather than internal opinions.
all.zh: 若有疑慮，請以顧客觀點為優先而非內部意見。

all.en: Facilitators will rotate between groups to assist with stuck moments.
all.zh: 帶領者將在各組間輪轉，協助化解卡關時刻。

all.en: We will reconvene as one large group for the gallery walk at noon.
all.zh: 我們將於中午集合為一大組進行畫廊巡禮。

all.en: Each group will present three key insights during the gallery share.
all.zh: 畫廊分享時每組將呈報三項關鍵洞察。

all.en: Photos of the wall maps will be shared in tomorrow morning follow up email.
all.zh: 牆面地圖的照片將於明早的後續郵件中分享。

all.en: Please complete the brief workshop feedback form before you leave the room.
all.zh: 離開會場前請填寫簡短的工作坊回饋表。

all.en: Thank you for your energy and commitment to improving the customer experience.
all.zh: 感謝各位的活力與對改善顧客體驗的投入。

all.en: Follow up interviews will be scheduled with five customers to validate findings.
all.zh: 我們將安排與五位顧客進行後續訪談以驗證發現。

all.en: An executive readout is planned for two weeks after the workshop concludes.
all.zh: 工作坊結束兩週後將舉行高階主管成果簡報。

all.en: Workshop outcomes will inform our annual customer experience roadmap planning.
all.zh: 工作坊成果將用於規劃我們的年度顧客體驗路徑圖。

all.en: Each pain point will be matched with potential metrics for tracking improvement.
all.zh: 每項痛點都將配對潛在指標以追蹤改善成效。

all.en: Quick win opportunities will be highlighted for resolution in the current quarter.
all.zh: 速勝機會將被標示為當季解決的重點項目。

all.en: Cross departmental dependencies will be made transparent in the final journey map.
all.zh: 跨部門相依性將於最終旅程地圖中清楚呈現。

all.en: Voice of customer quotes will be embedded in key emotional low moments.
all.zh: 顧客原聲引述將嵌入關鍵的情緒低谷時刻中。

all.en: A simplified version of the map will be created for executive presentations.
all.zh: 將另製作精簡版地圖供高階主管簡報使用。

all.en: Future workshops will explore the journey for our small business customer segment.
all.zh: 未來工作坊將探討我們小型企業顧客族群的旅程。

all.en: Please share these methods with peers who could not attend in person today.
all.zh: 請將這些方法分享給今日無法親臨現場的同仁。

all.en: Quick personal story, I once thought I knew our customer journey perfectly until I shadowed support for one day.
all.zh: 說個小故事，我曾經以為自己對顧客旅程瞭若指掌，直到陪客服跟了一天班才發現完全不是。

all.en: By lunchtime I had filled an entire notebook with surprises I never expected to hear.
all.zh: 到午餐時間，我整本筆記本已經寫滿了我完全沒想到會聽到的意外。

all.en: One customer even thanked us for a feature that we had quietly removed two months earlier.
all.zh: 甚至有位顧客為了一個我們兩個月前默默移除的功能而感謝我們。

all.en: Moments like that humble you and remind you to listen first and assume nothing.
all.zh: 這種時刻會讓你變謙虛，也提醒你要先聆聽，別自己腦補。

all.en: If you have time this week, try grabbing coffee with someone from a different team.
all.zh: 如果你這週有時間，試著找不同團隊的人喝杯咖啡聊聊。

all.en: Ask them what they hear from customers most often and just write it down.
all.zh: 問問他們最常從顧客那邊聽到什麼，然後好好寫下來。

all.en: You will spot patterns that no internal dashboard could ever show you on its own.
all.zh: 你會發現一些內部儀表板絕對抓不到的規律。

all.en: Last quarter, that approach gave me three improvement ideas I am still working on today.
all.zh: 上一季我用這個方法收集到三個改善點子，到現在還在持續推進。

all.en: Bring those candid stories back into the journey map so it stays real over time.
all.zh: 請把這些真實的小故事帶回旅程地圖，讓它能持續貼近現實。

all.en: Drop me a message anytime if you want to brainstorm before the executive readout.
all.zh: 高階主管簡報前如果你想一起腦力激盪，隨時傳訊息給我。
